title: Tension Rhythm
objective: Tune pressure waves so the thriller accelerates, breathes, and hits harder instead of flattening out.
storyQuestions: Where is the route fatiguing because too many high-burden choices stack together?
Where is it stalling because investigation loops do not escalate?
Which scenes should shorten, and which need more oxygen?
baseAcceptanceChecks: The touched span shows a clearer pressure rise-fall pattern.
The revision reduces either repetition or reader exhaustion without lowering suspense.
